raw.headline: David and Victoria Beckham in planning row with Cotswolds neighbours

winner: Why did David and Victoria Beckham's planning application get rejected? The zoning board said they couldn't build a mansion that outshone their neighbors' cottages—it was *too* "Cotswoldsy.
